name: Jump Only
author: Poki
description: Jump! That's the only way for you to escape... Jump Only is a high-skill platforming game where you can showcase your incredible reaction time and jumping skills. Hop your way around dangerous obstacles as you dodge spikes and saw-blades on your way to the finish line. There are 49 different levels for you to conquer, and your journey is accompanied by catchy background beats. Every few levels, the theme changes bringing you different challenges to overcome. Do you have what it takes to ascend to the top? How do I play Jump Only? Avoid the obstacles and jump your way up to the finish line. Jump Left: A, the Left Arrow Key, or Left Mouse Button. Jump Right: D, the Right Arrow Key, or Right Mouse Button. Who created Jump Only? Jump Only is created by Kimo. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Jump Only for free? You can play Jump Only for free on Poki. Can I play Jump Only on mobile devices and desktop? Jump Only can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
